CONTENT.Career: In 2023, Cruz signed for Italian Serie A side Hellas Verona.
CONTENT.Early life: Cruz moved from Argentina to the Netherlands and Italy at a young age before returning to Argentina.
CONTENT.Personal life: Cruz is the son of Argentina international Julio Cruz.
CONTENT.Style of play: Cruz mainly operates as a striker and is known for his speed.

SUMMARY: Juan Manuel Cruz (born 19 July 1999) is an Argentine footballer who plays as a striker for Serie A club Hellas Verona.
